name: Coq Au Vin- Chicken Braised in Wine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté diced bacon and green onions until the bacon is crisp.
2. Remove and drain on paper towels.
3. Add chicken pieces to the skillet and brown well on all sides.
4. Remove the chicken when it has browned and set aside.
5. Place peeled onions, mushrooms, potatoes, and garlic into a Crock-POT.
6. Add the browned chicken pieces, bacon, green onions, salt, pepper, thyme, potatoes, and chicken broth to the Crock-POT.
7. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours (High: 3 to 4 hours).
8. During the last hour of cooking, add Burgundy wine and cook on High.
9. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
